        <td id="L2741" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2741"></td>
        <td id="LC2741" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02741                 .BYTE $07                             ; GR2</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>

      <tr>
        <td id="L2763" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2763"></td>

      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2764" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2764"></td>
        <td id="LC2764" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02764 ; DESCRIPTION</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2765" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2765"></td>
        <td id="LC2765" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02765 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2766" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2766"></td>
        <td id="LC2766" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02766 ; Initializes the game, then continues into the game loop at GAMELOOP ($A1F3).</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2767" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2767"></td>
        <td id="LC2767" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02767 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2768" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2768"></td>
        <td id="LC2768" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02768 ; There are four entry points to initialization:</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2769" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2769"></td>
        <td id="LC2769" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02769 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2770" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2770"></td>
        <td id="LC2770" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02770 ; (1)  INITCOLD ($A14A) is entered at initial cartridge startup (cold start).</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2771" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2771"></td>
        <td id="LC2771" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02771 ;      This initializes POKEY, resets the idle counter, sets the mission level</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2772" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2772"></td>
        <td id="LC2772" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02772 ;      to NOVICE mission, and clears the function key code. POKEY is enabled to</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2773" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2773"></td>
        <td id="LC2773" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02773 ;      receive keyboard input. Code execution continues into INITSELECT ($A15A)</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2774" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2774"></td>
        <td id="LC2774" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02774 ;      below.</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2775" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2775"></td>
        <td id="LC2775" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02775 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2776" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2776"></td>
        <td id="LC2776" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02776 ; (2)  INITSELECT ($A15A) is entered from GAMELOOP ($A1F3) after the SELECT</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2777" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2777"></td>
        <td id="LC2777" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02777 ;      function key has been pressed. This loads the title phrase offset for the</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2778" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2778"></td>
        <td id="LC2778" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02778 ;      copyright notice. Code execution continues into INITDEMO ($A15C) below. </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2779" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2779"></td>
        <td id="LC2779" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02779 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2780" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2780"></td>
        <td id="LC2780" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02780 ; (3)  INITDEMO ($A15C) is entered when the game switches into demo mode. This</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2781" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2781"></td>
        <td id="LC2781" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02781 ;      loads the demo mode flag. Code execution continues into INITSTART ($A15E)</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2782" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2782"></td>
        <td id="LC2782" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02782 ;      below.</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2783" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2783"></td>
        <td id="LC2783" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02783 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2784" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2784"></td>
        <td id="LC2784" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02784 ; (4)  INITSTART ($A15E) is entered from GAMELOOP ($A1F3) after the START</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2785" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2785"></td>
        <td id="LC2785" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02785 ;      function key has been pressed. This enqueues the new title phrase and</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2786" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2786"></td>
        <td id="LC2786" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02786 ;      enables or disables demo mode, depending on the preloaded value.</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2787" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2787"></td>
        <td id="LC2787" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02787 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2788" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2788"></td>
        <td id="LC2788" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02788 ; Initialization continues with the following steps: </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2789" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2789"></td>
        <td id="LC2789" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02789 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2790" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2790"></td>
        <td id="LC2790" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02790 ; (1)  Clear the custom chip registers and zero page game variables from</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2791" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2791"></td>
        <td id="LC2791" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02791 ;      ISVBISYNC ($0067) on.</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2792" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2792"></td>
        <td id="LC2792" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02792 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2793" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2793"></td>
        <td id="LC2793" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02793 ;      NOTE: Because of loop jamming there is a loop index overshoot. This</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2794" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2794"></td>
        <td id="LC2794" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02794 ;      clears memory at $0067..$0166 instead of the game&#39;s zero page memory at</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2795" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2795"></td>
        <td id="LC2795" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02795 ;      $0067..$00FB. However, this does no harm because memory at $0100..$0166</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2796" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2796"></td>
        <td id="LC2796" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02796 ;      is - at this point in time - a yet unused part of the 6502 CPU stack</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2797" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2797"></td>
        <td id="LC2797" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02797 ;      (memory addresses $0100..$01FF).</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2798" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2798"></td>
        <td id="LC2798" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02798 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2799" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2799"></td>
        <td id="LC2799" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02799 ;      NOTE: At address $A175 a hack is necessary in the source code to force an</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2800" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2800"></td>
        <td id="LC2800" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02800 ;      STA ISVBISYNC,X instruction with a 16-bit address operand, as opposed to</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2801" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2801"></td>
        <td id="LC2801" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02801 ;      an 8-bit (zero page) address operand. The latter would be chosen by</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2802" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2802"></td>
        <td id="LC2802" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02802 ;      virtually all 6502 assemblers, as ISVBISYNC ($0067) is located in the</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2803" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2803"></td>
        <td id="LC2803" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02803 ;      zero page (memory addresses $0000..$00FF). The reason to force a 16-bit</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2804" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2804"></td>
        <td id="LC2804" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02804 ;      address operand is the following: The instruction STA ISVBISYNC,X is used</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2805" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2805"></td>
        <td id="LC2805" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02805 ;      in a loop which iterates the CPU&#39;s X register from 0 to 255 to clear</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2806" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2806"></td>
        <td id="LC2806" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02806 ;      memory. By using this instruction with a 16-bit address operand</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2807" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2807"></td>
        <td id="LC2807" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02807 ;      (&quot;indexed, absolute&quot; mode), memory at $0067..$0166 is cleared. Had the</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2808" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2808"></td>
        <td id="LC2808" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02808 ;      code been using the same operation with an 8-bit address operand</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2809" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2809"></td>
        <td id="LC2809" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02809 ;      (&quot;indexed, zero page&quot; mode), memory at $0067..$00FF would have been</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2810" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2810"></td>
        <td id="LC2810" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02810 ;      cleared first, then the indexed address would have wrapped back to $0000</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2811" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2811"></td>
        <td id="LC2811" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02811 ;      and cleared memory at $0000..$0066, thus effectively overwriting already</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2812" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2812"></td>
        <td id="LC2812" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02812 ;      initialized memory locations.</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2813" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2813"></td>
        <td id="LC2813" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02813 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2814" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2814"></td>
        <td id="LC2814" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02814 ; (2)  Initialize the 6502 CPU (reset the stack pointer, disable decimal mode).</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2815" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2815"></td>
        <td id="LC2815" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02815 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2816" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2816"></td>
        <td id="LC2816" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02816 ; (3)  Clear game memory from $0200..$1FFF in subroutine CLRMEM ($AE0F).</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2817" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2817"></td>
        <td id="LC2817" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02817 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2818" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2818"></td>
        <td id="LC2818" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02818 ; (4)  Set the address vectors of the IRQ, VBI, and DLI handlers.</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2819" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2819"></td>
        <td id="LC2819" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02819 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2820" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2820"></td>
        <td id="LC2820" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02820 ; (5)  Enable input from Joystick 0.</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2821" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2821"></td>
        <td id="LC2821" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02821 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2822" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2822"></td>
        <td id="LC2822" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02822 ; (6)  Enable Player/Missile graphics, providing a fifth PLAYER, and set</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2823" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2823"></td>
        <td id="LC2823" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02823 ;      PLAYER-PLAYFIELD priority.</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2824" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2824"></td>
        <td id="LC2824" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02824 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2825" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2825"></td>
        <td id="LC2825" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02825 ;      BUG (at $A1A6): The set PLAYER-PLAYFIELD priority arranges PLAYERs</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2826" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2826"></td>
        <td id="LC2826" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02826 ;      (PL0..4) in front of the PLAYFIELD (PF0..4) in this specific order, from</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2827" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2827"></td>
        <td id="LC2827" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02827 ;      front to back:</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2828" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2828"></td>
        <td id="LC2828" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02828 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2829" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2829"></td>
        <td id="LC2829" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02829 ;          PL0 &gt; PL1 &gt; PL2 &gt; PL3 &gt; PL4 &gt; PF0, PF1, PF2 &gt; PF4 (BGR)</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2830" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2830"></td>
        <td id="LC2830" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02830 ;</td>
      </tr>

        <td id="L2967" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2967"></td>

        <td id="L2968" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2968"></td>
        <td id="LC2968" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02968 ; DESCRIPTION</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2969" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2969"></td>
        <td id="LC2969" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02969 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2970" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2970"></td>
        <td id="LC2970" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02970 ; The game loop is the main part of the game. It is basically an infinite loop</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2971" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2971"></td>
        <td id="LC2971" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02971 ; that collects input, computes the game state, and updates the display. It</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2972" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2972"></td>
        <td id="LC2972" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02972 ; executes the following steps:</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2973" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2973"></td>
        <td id="LC2973" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02973 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2974" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2974"></td>
        <td id="LC2974" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02974 ; (1)  Synchronize the start of the game loop with the vertical blank phase of</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2975" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2975"></td>
        <td id="LC2975" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02975 ;      the TV beam, which flagged by the Vertical Blank Interrupt handler</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2976" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2976"></td>
        <td id="LC2976" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02976 ;      VBIHNDLR ($A6D1). This prevents screen flicker while the PLAYFIELD is</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2977" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2977"></td>
        <td id="LC2977" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02977 ;      redrawn at the beginning of the game loop, because during the vertical</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2978" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2978"></td>
        <td id="LC2978" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02978 ;      blank phase the TV beam is turned off and nothing is rendered on the TV</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2979" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2979"></td>
        <td id="LC2979" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02979 ;      display. </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2980" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2980"></td>
        <td id="LC2980" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02980 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2981" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2981"></td>
        <td id="LC2981" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02981 ; (2)  Erase all PLAYFIELD space objects (stars, explosion fragments) from the</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2982" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2982"></td>
        <td id="LC2982" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02982 ;      PLAYFIELD that were drawn in the previous game loop iteration.</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2983" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2983"></td>
        <td id="LC2983" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02983 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2984" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2984"></td>
        <td id="LC2984" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02984 ; (3)  Draw the updated PLAYFIELD space objects (stars, explosion fragments)</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2985" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2985"></td>
        <td id="LC2985" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02985 ;      into the PLAYFIELD (skip this if in hyperspace).</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2986" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2986"></td>
        <td id="LC2986" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02986 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2987" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2987"></td>
        <td id="LC2987" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02987 ; (4)  If the idle counter has reached its trigger value then clear the center</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2988" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2988"></td>
        <td id="LC2988" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02988 ;      of the PLAYFIELD, an 8 x 2 pixel rectangle with a top-left position at</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2989" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2989"></td>
        <td id="LC2989" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02989 ;      pixel column number 76 and pixel row number 49 (?).</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2990" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2990"></td>
        <td id="LC2990" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02990 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2991" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2991"></td>
        <td id="LC2991" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02991 ; (5)  Clear all PLAYER shapes.</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2992" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2992"></td>
        <td id="LC2992" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02992 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2993" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2993"></td>
        <td id="LC2993" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02993 ; (6)  Update the vertical position of all PLAYERs and update all PLAYER shapes.</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2994" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2994"></td>
        <td id="LC2994" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02994 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2995" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2995"></td>
        <td id="LC2995" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02995 ; (7)  Update the horizontal position of all PLAYERs.</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2996" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2996"></td>
        <td id="LC2996" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02996 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2997" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2997"></td>
        <td id="LC2997" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02997 ; (8)  Rotate the position vector of all space objects horizontally and</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2998" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2998"></td>
        <td id="LC2998" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02998 ;      vertically, according to the saved joystick position (skip this if in</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L2999" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="2999"></td>
        <td id="LC2999" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">02999 ;      Galactic Chart view) using subroutine ROTATE ($B69B).</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3000" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3000"></td>
        <td id="LC3000" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03000 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3001" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3001"></td>
        <td id="LC3001" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03001 ; (9)  Move our starship forward in space. Our starship is always located at the</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3002" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3002"></td>
        <td id="LC3002" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03002 ;      center of the game&#39;s 3D coordinate system, so all space objects are moved</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3003" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3003"></td>
        <td id="LC3003" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03003 ;      along the z-axis toward our starship by subtracting a displacement from</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3004" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3004"></td>
        <td id="LC3004" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03004 ;      their z-coordinate. The amount of the displacement depends on our</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3005" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3005"></td>
        <td id="LC3005" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03005 ;      starship&#39;s velocity.</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3006" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3006"></td>
        <td id="LC3006" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03006 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3007" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3007"></td>
        <td id="LC3007" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03007 ;      BUG (at $A3C1): This operation is not applied to Photon torpedoes (?).</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3008" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3008"></td>
        <td id="LC3008" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03008 ;      Suggested fix: Remove LDA PL0SHAPTYPE,X and BEQ SKIP011. </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3009" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3009"></td>
        <td id="LC3009" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03009 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3010" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3010"></td>
        <td id="LC3010" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03010 ; (10) Add the proper velocity vector of all space objects to their position</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3011" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3011"></td>
        <td id="LC3011" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03011 ;      vector (except for stars, which do not have any proper motion).</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3012" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3012"></td>
        <td id="LC3012" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03012 ;</td>
      </tr>

        <td id="LC3649" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03649 ; o   Update the PLAYER&#39;s shape offset and height. On the way to the shape</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3650" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3650"></td>
        <td id="LC3650" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03650 ;     offset and height add the PLAYER&#39;s shape type to the range index and</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3651" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3651"></td>
        <td id="LC3651" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03651 ;     divide it by 2 to arrive at the shape offset index and height index (the</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3652" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3652"></td>
        <td id="LC3652" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03652 ;     same value). Use this index to pick the correct shape data and shape</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3653" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3653"></td>
        <td id="LC3653" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03653 ;     heights from a set of shape cells and their corresponding heights, stored</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3654" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3654"></td>
        <td id="LC3654" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03654 ;     in tables PLSHAPOFFTAB ($BE2F) and PLSHAPHEIGHTTAB ($BE7F), respectively.</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3655" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3655"></td>
        <td id="LC3655" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03655 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3656" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3656"></td>
        <td id="LC3656" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03656 ;     Remember that magic distance value used in the Galactic Chart and</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3657" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3657"></td>
        <td id="LC3657" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03657 ;     Long-Range Scan view? Its value of $F2 is actually part of a negative</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3658" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3658"></td>
        <td id="LC3658" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03658 ;     z-coordinate which is inverted to $0D00, leading to a range index of 13,</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3659" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3659"></td>
        <td id="LC3659" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">03659 ;     which, after the division by 2, picks shape cell 6. Shape cell 6 (the</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L3660" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="3660"></td>

      </tr>
      <tr>

      </tr>

      </tr>

      </tr>

        <td id="L4156" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4156"></td>

      </tr>

        <td id="L4157" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4157"></td>
        <td id="LC4157" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04157 ; added. The resulting keyboard code is stored in KEYCODE ($CA).</td>
      </tr>

        <td id="L4158" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4158"></td>

        <td id="L4183" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4183"></td>
        <td id="LC4183" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04183 ; DRAWLINESTAB ($BAF9). This table consists of a list of 3-byte elements,</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L4184" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4184"></td>
        <td id="LC4184" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04184 ; terminated by an end marker byte ($FE). Each such element defines a single</td>
      </tr>

        <td id="L4185" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4185"></td>
        <td id="LC4185" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04185 ; horizontal or vertical line, and is passed via memory addresses DIRLEN ($A4),</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L4186" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4186"></td>
        <td id="LC4186" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04186 ; PENROW ($A5), and PENCOLUMN ($A6) to subroutine DRAWLINE ($A782), which</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L4187" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4187"></td>
        <td id="LC4187" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04187 ; executes the actual drawing. See subroutine DRAWLINE ($A782) and table</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L4188" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4188"></td>
        <td id="LC4188" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04188 ; DRAWLINESTAB ($BAF9) for a description of the 3-byte elements. </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L4189" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4189"></td>
        <td id="LC4189" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04189 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>

        <td id="L4434" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4434"></td>

      </tr>
      <tr>

      <tr>
        <td id="L4437" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4437"></td>
        <td id="LC4437" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04437 LOOP030         ASL A                   ; Shift bit pattern one position to the left</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L4438" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4438"></td>
        <td id="LC4438" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04438                 STA L.SHIFTSHAP         ; Temporarily save shifted shape byte</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L4439" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4439"></td>
        <td id="LC4439" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04439                 BCC SKIP052             ; Skip if shifted-out bit = 0</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L4440" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4440"></td>
        <td id="LC4440" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04440</td>

        <td id="LC4451" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04451                 BNE LOOP030             ; Next horizontal pixel of blip shape</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L4452" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4452"></td>
        <td id="LC4452" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04452</td>
      </tr>

      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L4454" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4454"></td>

      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L4455" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4455"></td>

      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L4456" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4456"></td>

      </tr>
      <tr>

      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L4458" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4458"></td>
        <td id="LC4458" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04458 SKIP054         CPY #10                 ; Return if blip cycle &lt; 10</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L4459" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4459"></td>
        <td id="LC4459" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04459                 BCC SKIP053             ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L4460" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4460"></td>
        <td id="LC4460" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04460</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L4461" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4461"></td>
        <td id="LC4461" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04461 ;*** Blip cycle 10: Calculate new blip pixel row and column numbers ************</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L4462" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4462"></td>
        <td id="LC4462" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04462                 LDA PL0LIFE,X           ; Skip if tracked object not alive</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L4463" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4463"></td>
        <td id="LC4463" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04463                 BEQ SKIP059             ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L4464" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4464"></td>
        <td id="LC4464" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04464</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L4465" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4465"></td>
        <td id="LC4465" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04465                 LDA XPOSHI,X            ; Map x-coordinate of tracked space obj to -11..11:</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L4466" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4466"></td>
        <td id="LC4466" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04466                 LDY XPOSSIGN,X          ; Skip if tracked object on left screen half (x &gt;= 0)</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L4467" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="4467"></td>
        <td id="LC4467" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">04467                 BEQ SKIP055             ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>

      </tr>
      <tr>

      </tr>

        <td id="L7354" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="7354"></td>
        <td id="LC7354" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">07354 ; This subroutine has two entry points: </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L7355" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="7355"></td>
        <td id="LC7355" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">07355 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L7356" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="7356"></td>
        <td id="LC7356" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">07356 ; (1)  GAMEOVER ($B10A) is entered at the end of a failed mission (mission</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L7357" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="7357"></td>
        <td id="LC7357" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">07357 ;      aborted, zero energy, or starship destroyed by Zylon fire), essentially</td>
      </tr>

        <td id="L7358" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="7358"></td>
        <td id="LC7358" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">07358 ;      shutting down our starship. Code execution continues into GAMEOVER2</td>
      </tr>

        <td id="L7359" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="7359"></td>
        <td id="LC7359" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">07359 ;      ($B121) below.</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L7360" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="7360"></td>

      </tr>

      </tr>

      </tr>

        <td id="LC7363" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">07363 ;      corresponding game over message, and calculates the scored rank and</td>

      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L9263" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="9263"></td>
        <td id="LC9263" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">09263 ; and where TERM1 and TERM2 are position vector components (coordinates). In</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L9264" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="9264"></td>
        <td id="LC9264" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">09264 ; fact, this is all this subroutine actually does: It simply adds TERM2 divided</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L9265" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="9265"></td>
        <td id="LC9265" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">09265 ; by 64 to TERM1 or subtracts TERM2 divided by 64 from TERM1. </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L9266" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="9266"></td>
        <td id="LC9266" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">09266 ;</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L9267" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="9267"></td>
        <td id="LC9267" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">09267 ; When calling this subroutine the correct indices for the appropriate position</td>

        <td id="LC9271" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">09271 ; What about SIGN between TERM1 and TERM3? Have again a look at expressions</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L9272" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="9272"></td>
        <td id="LC9272" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">09272 ; (3a)-(6b). To compute the two new coordinates after a rotation, the SIGN</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L9273" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="9273"></td>
        <td id="LC9273" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">09273 ; toggles from plus to minus and vice versa. The SIGN is initialized with</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L9274" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="9274"></td>
        <td id="LC9274" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">09274 ; JOYSTICKDELTA ($6D) before calling subroutine ROTATE ($B69B) and is toggled</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L9275" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="9275"></td>
        <td id="LC9275" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">09275 ; inside every call of this subroutine before the addition or subtraction of the</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L9276" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="9276"></td>
        <td id="LC9276" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">09276 ; terms takes place there. The initial value of SIGN should be positive (+) if</td>
      </tr>

        <td id="L9277" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="9277"></td>

      </tr>

        <td id="L9278" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="9278"></td>
        <td id="LC9278" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">09278 ; (-) if the rotation is counter-clockwise (the joystick is pushed left or</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L9279" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="9279"></td>
        <td id="LC9279" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">09279 ; down), respectively. Because SIGN is always toggled inside the subroutine</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L9280" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="9280"></td>
        <td id="LC9280" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">09280 ; before the addition or subtraction of the terms actually happens there, you</td>

      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td id="L9282" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="9282"></td>

      </tr>

        <td id="L11308" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="11308"></td>
        <td id="LC11308" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">11308 ; (2) BEEPPAUSELIFE ($D5) Lifetime of pause in TICKs - 1 ($FF -&gt; No pause)</td>
      </tr>

      <tr>
        <td id="L11310" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="11310"></td>
        <td id="LC11310" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">11310 ;                         stopped if a beeper sound pattern of higher priority is about to be</td>
      </tr>

        <td id="L11311" class="blob-num js-line-number" data-line-number="11311"></td>
        <td id="LC11311" class="blob-code blob-code-inner js-file-line">11311 ;                         played. A value of 0 indicates that no beeper sound pattern is</td>
      </tr>
